name: pdca-skill-creator
description: Create PDCA-based Codex skills and run iterative creator use case tests with business-core-first execution, evidence-backed maturity grading, self-optimization matrices, plugin-aware testing, crawler scaffolds, selector consumption, contract-consistent checks, smoke tests, clean packaging, logs, and reports.

interface.longDescription: Create Codex skills that follow a PDCA loop with Plan, Do, Check, and Act stages while preserving the business core first. It generates core implementation plans, crawler scaffolds for page inspection tasks, selector and field extraction matrices, evidence-backed maturity grading, capability matrices, layered self-optimization evaluation with retest evidence paths, executable scaffolds, contract-consistent rule-driven checks, plugin-aware use case tests, smoke tests, clean installable plugin directories when requested, evidence, logs, health diagnosis, historical requirements, and iterative creator use case test reports.
defaultPrompt: Use $pdca-skill-creator to create a skill for a recurring workflow.
Use $pdca-skill-creator to upgrade an existing workflow skill.
Use $pdca-skill-creator to design a self-checking inspection skill.
Use $pdca-skill-creator to run iterative creator use case tests and improve the creator rules.
